interactions.rationale: Combines initial-range quality with daily-range location.
Combines HTF directional state with initial-range quality.
Combines HTF directional state with daily-range location.
Combines daily directional alignment with range quality.
Combines daily direction with prior-day location.
Combines daily volatility regime with range-to-volatility fit.

unavailable_handling: Pass through unavailable warm-up observations for both parents.

requirements: Expectancy improves by at least 0.03R, or drawdown falls by at least 20% without lower expectancy.
Calendar-year stability requirement from the primary preregistration.

interpretation_lock: No third factor, threshold tuning, session filtering, weekday filtering, or alternative interaction may be added after results are inspected.
